Projects & Work

Only the projects from your previous portfolio are included.

LawBot — AI-Powered Legal Assistant

Developed at a hackathon, LawBot is an intelligent legal assistant designed to make law accessible to everyone — not just those who can afford a lawyer. The bot understands natural language queries and responds with accurate, jurisdiction-aware legal guidance drawn from a curated legal knowledge base.

Natural Language Understanding — Users can ask legal questions in plain everyday language without needing legal terminology.
Legal Domain Coverage — Handles civil law, criminal law, consumer rights, tenancy, and employment law queries.
Case Referencing — Surfaces relevant Indian legal statutes, IPC sections, and landmark case precedents.
Multilingual Potential — Designed with accessibility in mind, with scope for regional language expansion.
Disclaimer-Aware Responses — Encourages professional consultation where needed.
PythonNLPAI ChatbotLegal TechKnowledge BaseTeam Project

Supplier Management System

A console-based Java application to manage supplier records, inventory relationships, and procurement data.

Railway Management System

A Java-based system simulating train scheduling, seat reservation, passenger management, and ticket generation.
